'''Yeere''' was the largest [[City/Legends|city]] found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Reytha]] and the planet's [[Capital/Legends|capital]]. There was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] base there. By [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the base was abandoned. During the [[Reytha campaign]] of that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] led an attack force against [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces from Yeere. Buildings within Yeere included a mech factory, a command center, a troop center, and an animal nursery.

==Behind the scenes==
Yeere appears in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' during the Darth Vader campaign. The campaign was also included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
